hero.title: Investment opportunities
hero.subtitle: Discover investment opportunities in New Valley and connect with startups

intro.loading: Loading startup details before sending your inquiry.
intro.target: Your inquiry will be saved and sent directly to {{name}}.
intro.startup: Your inquiry will be saved and sent directly to the startup owner.
intro.opportunity: Your inquiry will be saved and sent directly to the opportunity owner.

toast.unavailableStartup: This startup is not available right now
toast.unavailableOpportunity: This opportunity is not available right now

toast.loadError: Unable to load startup details right now
toast.ownStartup: You cannot send an inquiry to your own startup
toast.successStartup: Your inquiry was sent to the startup owner successfully
toast.successOpportunity: Your inquiry was sent successfully and will appear in the opportunity owner inbox
